response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:49: Identified song '君セン！' (Kimi Sen!) by iLiFE! performed by Usada Pekora and Momosuzu Nene. Searched for lyrics, found them on UtaTen. 2. 02:50-02:52: Identified transition/pause. 3. 02:53-04:29: Identified song 'ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星' (Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei) by Kessoku Band performed by Usada Pekora and Momosuzu Nene. Searched for lyrics using ZAQ (lyricist), found them on UtaTen/Oricon. 4. Structured scenes and included full lyrics. Corrected timestamp formatting in JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live stage performance by VTubers Usada Pekora and Momosuzu Nene. They perform the song 'Kimi Sen!' followed by a short transition and then 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei'.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Momosuzu Nene perform 'Kimi Sen!'. The stage is vibrant with pink lights and carrot decorations.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Proposal! Shall I start? Just kidding.
Biting toast, bumping into you at the intersection, it's not like that, but I had a premonition.
It was surely (As I thought!) destined (That's right!).
I believed I could meet you. Your exclusive smile. Standby OK!
Complaining, sighing, it happens, I understand.
If you're lonely and crying, if you're so irritated you can't stand it, it's my turn!
I'll take your hand and lead you. Welcome! To the invincible theme park.
Better just forget everything! For now, just look at me.
It's a bottomless swamp. I can't even think about it, I'll give you love. I like you.
Proposal! Shall I start? Just kidding.
Looks like the flag hasn't been set yet. I don't care about that. Straight to the True end.
It's sure (As I thought!) stable (That's right!).
A classic two-shot, a space just for the two of us. Standby OK!
Soaring high, reflecting on it later, it happens, I understand.
If I take over your brain and you can't sleep, if you're so restless you can't stand it, always come to me.
Let's build it up little by little. Welcome! To the infinite party time.
Better just be together forever. Keep laughing until the end.
I want you to know more. I'll present you with the highest class, holding the hem of the shirt I grabbed softly.
You don't have to think deeply, just keep having 'fun'!
The day we joined is becoming tomorrow. Full speed ahead, Yo-Ho-Ro!
Let's go see a scene you wouldn't believe. You're aware you're getting into it, right?
With play like that, I can't be satisfied anymore. I can get obsessed, I can make you obsessed.
Welcome! To the invincible theme park. Better just forget everything!
For now, just look at me. It's a bottomless swamp.
I can't even think about it, I'll give you love. I like you.
Time doesn't matter. Look, you're laughing even now.
Proposal! Shall I start? Just kidding.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Momosuzu Nene perform 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Wakusei'. The stage is set to a darker, rock-themed aesthetic.
scenes.song_title: ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌
空のご機嫌なんか知らない
季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ
春と秋 どこいっちゃったんだよ
息も出来ない 情報の圧力 めまいの螺旋だ
わたしはどこにいる
こんなに こんなに 息の音がするのに
変だね 世界の音がしない
足りない 足りない 誰にも気づかれない
殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ
「ありのまま」なんて 誰に見せるんだ
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
エリクサーに張り替える作業もなんとなくなんだ
欠けた爪を少し触る
半径300mmの体で 必死に鳴いてる
音楽にとっちゃ ココが地球だな
空気を握って 空を殴るよ
なんにも起きない わたしは無力さ
だけどさ その手で この鉄を弾いたら
何かが変わって見えた…ような。
眩しい 眩しい そんなに光るなよ
わたしのダサい影が より色濃くなってしまうだろ
なんでこんな熱くなっちゃってんだ 止まんない
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
うるさいんだって 心臓 蒼い惑星
ひとりぼっち いっぱいの音を聞いてきた
回り続けて 幾億年
一瞬でもいいから…ああ 聞いて 聴けよ
わたし わたし わたしはここにいる
殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ
なんかになりたい なりたい 何者かでいい
馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Sudden evening shower, ah, I don't even have an umbrella. I don't know the sky's mood. Clothes for the change of seasons, what should I wear? Spring and autumn, where did they go? Can't even breathe, information pressure, a spiral of dizziness. Where am I? Even though I can hear my breathing so clearly, so clearly. Strange, I don't hear the sounds of the world. Not enough, not enough, no one notices me. Scribbled sounds, couldn't put them out, I screamed in that state, "as I am", who am I showing that to? I, a stupid person, just sing. Should I spill it all out? To the stars. Changing to elixir strings is just something I do. Touching the chipped nails a little with a body of 300mm radius, frantically singing. To music, this place is Earth. Grasping the air, punching the sky, nothing happens. I am helpless. But, if I strike this iron with that hand, something changed... it seemed like. Dazzling, dazzling, don't shine so brightly. My pathetic shadow becomes even more intense. Why am I getting so hot? It won't stop. I, a stupid person, just sing. It's noisy, heart, blue planet. I've heard too many sounds of being alone. Keeping spinning for billions of years, just for an instant... ah, listen, hear it, I, I, I am here. Scribbled sounds, couldn't put them out, I screamed in that state, I want to become something, become something, being anyone is fine, I, a stupid person, just sing. Should I spill it all out? To the stars.
